message: Node started: Solve the transcendental equation <n> = 1 / (1 + exp((epsilon * z * <n> - mu) / (k_B * T))) for <n>. Use the following constants: epsilon = -(k_B * T) / (2 * pi), mu = 0.1 * k_B * T, z = 12 (from z_h + z_v), and T = 300 K. Note that k_B and T will cancel out in the exponent. Find the value of <n> between 0 and 1 that satisfies the equation. Provide the result to four decimal places.
